name: create_bucket
description: Create a new R2 storage bucket in your Cloudflare account. Bucket names must be globally unique, between 3 and 63 characters, and comply with DNS naming conventions. You can optionally specify a location hint for data locality.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Your Cloudflare account ID. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the bucket to create (3-63 chars, lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens).

parameters.name: locationHint
parameters.description: Optional location hint for bucket placement (e.g., 'WNAM' for Western North America, 'ENAM', 'WEUR', 'EEUR', 'APAC').
